heading: Short title of subchapter
label: 167 Short title of subchapter
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “National Labor Relations Act”.
notes: Effective DateFor effective date of amendment by act , see section 104 of act , set out as a note under .June 23, 1947June 23, 1947section 151 of this title
